author: David Manthey
description: Offline speech-to-text using Whisper - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: David Manthey
manifest.description: Offline speech-to-text using Whisper.  Fully offline after initial download.
manifest.name: Offline Whisper Transcription

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/manthey/offline-whisper/compare/v1.1.2...v1.1.3

releases.author: manthey
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Adjust message when loading from mobile cache by @manthey in https://github.com/manthey/offline-whisper/pull/21
* Discard single "okay" messages. by @manthey in https://github.com/manthey/offline-whisper/pull/22


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/manthey/offline-whisper/compare/v1.1.0...v1.1.1

## What's Changed
* Test main.js and report it by @manthey in https://github.com/manthey/offline-whisper/pull/19
* Add additional tests by @manthey in https://github.com/manthey/offline-whisper/pull/20
* Adjust message when loading from mobile cache by @manthey in https://github.com/manthey/offline-whisper/pull/21
* Discard single "okay" messages. by @manthey in https://github.com/manthey/offline-whisper/pull/22


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/manthey/offline-whisper/compare/v1.1.0...v1.1.1
releases.name: v1.1.1

releases.author: manthey
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Update transformers package by @manthey in https://github.com/manthey/offline-whisper/pull/18


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/manthey/offline-whisper/compare/1.0.5...v1.1.0

## What's Changed
* Bump playwright from 1.58.2 to 1.60.0 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/manthey/offline-whisper/pull/16
* Bump softprops/action-gh-release from 2 to 3 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/manthey/offline-whisper/pull/15
* Bump esbuild from 0.27.3 to 0.28.0 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/manthey/offline-whisper/pull/14
* Report coverage by @manthey in https://github.com/manthey/offline-whisper/pull/17
* [pre-commit.ci] pre-commit autoupdate by @pre-commit-ci[bot] in https://github.com/manthey/offline-whisper/pull/11
* Update transformers package by @manthey in https://github.com/manthey/offline-whisper/pull/18


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/manthey/offline-whisper/compare/1.0.5...v1.1.0
